name: San Diego Sunshine
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to the desired temperature.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the water, applesauce, brown sugar, honey, and grated orange rind until well combined.
3. Add the bread flour, whole wheat flour, salt, and yeast to the wet ingredients. Mix until a dough forms.
4. Knead the dough on a floured surface until smooth and elastic, about 5-10 minutes.
5. Place the dough in an oiled bowl, cover with a damp cloth, and let rise in a warm place until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
6. Punch down the dough and shape it into a loaf.
7. Place the loaf on a baking sheet and bake at the desired temperature until golden brown and crust is light, about 30-40 minutes.
